title: doer input
description: Required dispatch-context keys for the doer role, per agents/doer.md Inputs section. Consumed by callers for pre-dispatch validation only -- never appended to the prompt or shown to the LLM.

branch.description: Sprint track branch to work on.

assignedBeadIds.description: The exact bead ids the doer is to work this run, chosen by the orchestrator. This is the doer's entire work list; it never discovers work via bare 'bd ready'.

modelTier.description: Informational: the model tier this doer runs as (cheap/standard/premium), assigned by the orchestrator from the task's beads metadata.
